name: VetTrack — Native ship checklist (demo)
description: Maps to docs/mobile/native-ship-checklist.md. Import via Audits tab (drag file or Import). Inspect Capacitor WKWebView (Develop → Simulator → VetTrack) or vettrack.uk. Export results into checklist Notes.

tests.name: 0 — Page context
tests.description: Record route + shell for the checklist matrix cell.

tests.name: url-hash-route-and-origin
tests.description: Copy route into native-ship-checklist Notes column.

tests.name: bundled-capacitor-or-production-host
viewport-meta-mobile-layout
1 — Auth & clinical UX (tier 1)
tests.description: Sign-in, signup, shift chat — native-ship-checklist tier 1.

tests.name: clerk-auth-form-ltr
tests.description: Hebrew RTL shell must not force sentence-case on reviewer@ email.

tests.name: email-inputs-no-autocapitalize
primary-tap-targets-44px
shift-chat-fab-present
tests.description: Sign in, open /home — tier 1 shift chat row. FAB uses class bottom-nav-float.

tests.name: 2 — WCAG 2.2 AA hints (manual sign-off)
tests.description: Automated hints only — still manual-sign WCAG per checklist row.

tests.name: single-main-landmark
buttons-have-accessible-names
images-have-alt
form-inputs-have-labels
dialogs-have-accessible-names
invalid-aria-hidden-values
page-language-declared
3 — Design polish signals
tests.description: Heuristic overflow/clipping checks — not a substitute for human review.

tests.name: no-horizontal-document-scroll
h1-not-severely-clipped
tests.description: Flags h1 with near-zero height — safe-area or header overlap.
